JUDGE:VON BEROLDINGEN CLERK:WILLIAMS REPORTER:GALLAGHER 9:30AM: CASE CALLED FOR TRIAL IN DEPT. 7 (611). NO APPEARANCE OF DEFENDANT. PLAIANTIFF YEO SWORN EXHIBIT 1-3DAY NOTICE MARKED,AND RECEIVED. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES, $25,000 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES PLUS COSTS. EXHIBIT WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCO, OLIVIA INDIV. & DBA OLIVIA'S PLACE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2600 BAYSHORE BLVD, S.F, CA. $25,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED
